name: blogwatcher
description: RSS/Atom blog feed monitoring CLI. Track blogs, scan for new articles, mark as read, and manage subscriptions. Commands: add, remove, blogs, scan, articles, read, read-all, unread. Go binary via go install. Ideal for content monitoring agents and research workflows.
review: RSS/blog feed monitoring CLI from the official openclaw monorepo. Covers core CRUD for feed subscriptions with real command output examples. No secrets required, reads public feeds. Useful for content monitoring agents and research workflows. Recommended: add cron/scheduled usage patterns for agent-first workflows.
